bugs.title: Sidebar squishing on split screens
bugs.description: Flexbox container squashed the sidebar width from 230px to 50px.
bugs.steps:
1. Open app
2. Resize window to 850px
3. Observe links text disappear

bugs.title: Dashboard empty state on DB timeout
bugs.description: Dashboard displayed empty metrics panels when Atlas connection timed out.
bugs.steps:
1. Stop network connectivity
2. Navigate to dashboard
3. Wait 10s for buffering error

notes.title: Pitch Presentation Strategy
notes.content:
Focus points for tomorrow:
- Revert Tailwind: emphasize standard clean CSS performance.
- Gold-Amber custom visual branding.
- Global fluid background blobs.
- Fully working local fallback database.

notes.title: Color Token Palette Guidelines
notes.content:
Theme tokens mapped to CSS variables:
- Primary: `#E5A93B` (Warm Gold)
- Secondary: `#C56C39` (Bronze)
- Surface: `rgba(20,20,24,0.72)` (Sleek Glassmorphic panels)
